Ezt a lábost nyugodtan mosogathatod mosogatógépben is. Nanopresso can reach a pressure of up to 18 bar and works ideally with finely ground coffee. It excels in its very low weight, so it is easy to carry and can hold up to 80 ml of water. In addition, its maintenance takes only a few seconds and the package also includes a high-quality hard case.
